chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 512 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 04.09.2023 Applicant Khadim Hussain Ujjan, present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – Mr. Ashique Ali Shaikh, Advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant, which is taken on record. 2. Against applicant, FIR No.35 of 2023 of Police Station Ranipur, District Khairpur under Section 489-F, P.P.C. has been registered for issuing a dishonest cheque of Rs.10,00,000/- to the complainant. Applicant is present and submits that compromise has been made and he has paid money to the complainant. The complainant and his Counsel both confirm this fact and have recorded no objection confirmation of bail. Accordingly, this application is allowed on above ground and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to applicant vide order dated 31.07.2023 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. J U D G E Abdul Basit
